privileged_info_summary: Completed PI audit for vtiger_crm_env process_lost_deal_followup task by confirming that the prerequisite Potential ('Apex Corp - Q3 Hardware Restock') and Account ('Apex Corporation') are synthetically generated and explicitly injected via a PHP script in setup_task.sh.
